name: Phone Macro Skill
description: Runs safe uploaded or generated phone automation macros made from allowed building blocks.

toolDeclarations.name: run_phone_macro
toolDeclarations.description: Run a short Android automation macro using safe building blocks. Use only when no dedicated skill is a better fit.

steps.description: Ordered macro steps. Supported action values: open_app, tap_text, tap_xy, type_text, wait, press_key, reply_notification, diagnose_ui, dump_ui.

items.description: One macro step with fields matching its action.

toolDeclarations.name: list_macro_actions
toolDeclarations.description: List the safe building blocks available to uploaded/custom macro skills.
